seoTitle: How to Fix TurboTax Not Loading: Quick Troubleshooting
metaDescription: TurboTax won't load? Try these troubleshooting steps, from clearing cache to checking system requirements, to get back to filing quickly.
intro: A TurboTax page that won't load is frustrating, especially close to a deadline. This guide covers the common troubleshooting steps to try, including clearing your cache and checking your system requirements, so you can get back to filing with minimal delay. It's written for both first-time users and experienced filers who hit an unexpected loading issue.

steps.heading: Try common troubleshooting methods first
steps.body: Start with the basics, like refreshing the page or restarting your browser, before moving to more specific fixes.

steps.heading: Clear your cache and cookies
steps.body: Clearing your browser's cache and cookies can resolve loading issues caused by outdated stored data.

steps.heading: Check your system requirements and settings
steps.body: Confirm your browser and device meet TurboTax's requirements, since compatibility issues can prevent the app from loading properly.

steps.heading: Apply final tips for performance
steps.body: If the issue persists, review additional settings or try an alternate browser to isolate what's causing the problem.

faq.question: Why won't TurboTax load in my browser?
faq.answer: Common causes include outdated cache and cookies, browser compatibility issues, or a temporary connectivity problem, all of which this guide's troubleshooting steps address.

faq.question: Does clearing my cache delete my TurboTax return data?
faq.answer: No, clearing your browser cache affects locally stored browser data, not your TurboTax account or return, which is saved to your account.

faq.question: Should I try a different browser if TurboTax still won't load?
faq.answer: Yes, switching browsers can help determine whether the issue is specific to your original browser's settings or a broader connectivity problem.

faq.question: Is this issue common close to tax deadlines?
faq.answer: Loading issues can happen at any time, though high traffic near deadlines can sometimes contribute to slower performance.
